MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Fri, 10 May 2024 02:21:00 -0700
Subject: Stormy Daniels's stormiest cross-examination moments, from the trial transcript
Message-ID: <663de700.170a0220.c1bd0.e1e1SMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACNH7LZSMX6F6NRCDLQCK7RNK57T37EAAYF6BG33N44TJ4JP4PI2JEGZHGZNSM5QW77O2FTDDT4FKFJXHWPE6RSNKZQ3VDWBI2VB566KETRMES3M2VUNODBDQKWRWVIOVNZP3XULKZYCMWH3ZLZQ4YOJB7ULOVVIA2WSPFM43N3IOP6AQZT6U&d=AIAADIWZGCJFNH3K5FCZBRAQOSAPW6IEW23KVZDSYJ6PVPKIFF74JA64OFKJ5VXBERAYD64AGQG46LJPWOGQZZNBEBTJCV4SOMXJ2QMD4PYYIDBRDOUALMLNNRFLEV7WRY6N2R5KI7A44G7XWYH5QFWEP2LAZHJSLVCTPMBBLKXJI4B5HLL5ISER5DHQFQIMESGCMSB7RKXEVNVQY4&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:24px 0 24px 0" align="center"><table style="padding:0 3px 0 3px" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td style="padding-right:35px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADKTEAIS554W4UIBVNYL3R6T4UEBKENI4DUCXP2RTWBAB4SNZGCHT3UCICLKWBXSA3BI5M63D7I3JNHB7PRYYKKFH2LL57W2CIABKM5PXPZIJ6QZKJJ5GIHF5RYZRSU62YEHW4P6BFBETXORRGJ7SPQ6VBVJLIQ6ALM3H6WXW3PBBT3D2T4FP&d=AIAACJP3TNX72TBDXLBRCZ5K5HXZ7HMSBFHIFIV2VN3JADAE2BJ5SWVQGP443OZPKC7E7GBNJU434BD2LRSHH7T5LZSCVHBWHJOEPLYFRBFZLH7Z6TPDZU5B2Q72YCOTOQUEPR6DLNSKKJWN4ZJJZ4THIXZPCUKYM5E6RXKTQC3EXT7YXO5DWR7X&" id="StartHeaderLogo" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="Logo" height="110" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.4464C20B10A9835DC26D56A7CF42E3D7&pid=BEmail&w=230&h=110&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="230"></a></td><td><table style="border-collapse:collapse"><tr><td height="50"></td></tr><tr><td style="border-left:2px solid;border-left-color:#ffb980;vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:10px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAC2HK4A6Q3JPL67JJ2SXFOVPNX4U4HIZXOXGGW7TUUSI3Y47UYJLWUMX3ALFO4YPXUZYHBHHDZG27J7DFQ3DGGQHFYE2RVFNIL3V6DVNEVE7VS2EPUMIRKZF7WOZKGQD44QAOBRPOCR3X24Y2C2H6LKVEVCLAMACQ24IS3HW6UXXNZFXJPWAQ&d=AIAACRS3HQOTIV6KQLQ2RRT2ZGPSZPD6CVAG2CQBN5UVY2LEYIVZFUTRCG3NDSNCK2VK7XI3U3GXLDKBKG5UOEVVJ4CARQZ3DRDYTB4JN4AWROO2SCSXEHJSIXTSXBG5HKN2WQA6WG5QCGPESUCAS52RCDY6LUEQBDDOUEZA4GL2SL43PINJKOME&" id="StartHeaderDescription" style="border:none;text-align:center;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><span style="color:#464646;font-size:15px;font-weight:400">Start Daily brings you trending news every weekday</span></a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td><td><img alt="" height="1" src="https://www.msn.com/newsletter/t/o?telemetrytoken=9e146be431b341948ed613323644aae9&market=en-us&topicid=d015f8a4-f187-4810-888d-afa2d49537cb" style="border:none" width="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></td></tr>
